title: Notification No.120/2015-Cus(NT), dated 24.11.2015
text: [To be published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part-II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii)] Government of India Ministry of Finance Department of Revenue (Central Board of Excise and Customs) Notification No. 120/2015-Customs (N.T.) New Delhi, the 24th November, 2015 S.O. (E). -In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 4 and sub-section (1) of section 5 of the Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962), the Central Board of Excise and Customs hereby appoints the Additional Director General (Adjudication), Directorate of Revenue Intelligence, New Delhi to act as a Common Adjudicating Authority to exercise the powers and discharge the duties conferred or imposed on - (i) the Commissioner of Customs (I&G), New Custom House, Near I G I Airport, New Delhi; (ii) the Commissioner of Customs, Inland Container Depot, 'ICD', Tughlakabad, New Delhi, for the purpose of adjudicating the matters relating to show cause notice pertaining to M/s Canon India Pvt. Ltd., 7th Floor, Tower B, Building # 5 DLF Epitome, DLF Phase III, Gurgaon issued vide Show Cause Notice number 23/85/2013-DZU (Pt.Canon)/3853 to 3858, dated the 9th August 2014 by the Additional Director General, Directorate of Revenue Intelligence, Delhi Zonal Unit, Delhi. [F No.437/44/2015-Cus.IV] (Z. R. Kamili) Director (Customs) -- 1 of 1 --
